revision.comment: start a page
add some more
add end here
add
add small
add these styles
move that doc
rework this just to convince myself
and resave as this
consistent styles for main and metadata boxes
like this padding better, indeed; sync right-left tho
bump to an even 0.3
make this just for the spans
Undid revision 988284245 by [[Special:Contributions/Izno|Izno]] ([[User talk:Izno|talk]]) nope
and bump padding
Izno moved page [[Module:Documentation/sandbox/styles.css]] to [[Module:Documentation/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect
not quite live yet
remove other-heading per talk page
shorten to documentation
-toolbar
Protected "[[Module:Documentation/styles.css]]": match module ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
pp small
Changed protection level for "[[Module:Documentation/styles.css]]": actually match module ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Night mode styles
clean
don't actually see a reason for this color either
inherit these instead
adj
Classes have been updated. More information on [[mw:Recommendations_for_night_mode_compatibility_on_Wikimedia_wikis]]
use the same green as the main page
Reverted edit by [[Special:Contribs/Izno|Izno]] ([[User talk:Izno|talk]]) to last version by Jdlrobson

Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors related to text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
